---
title: "clipboard.min.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/docs/site_libs/clipboard/clipboard.min.js"
loc: 1
complexity: 64
logic_score: 1.00
style_score: 8.19
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.20
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `e`
- `c`
- `a`
- `o`
- `n`
- `f`
- `e`
- `l`
- `s`
- `t`
- `p`
- `d`
- `n`
- `o`
- `y`
- `h`
- `o`
- `t`
- `v`
- `m`
- `b`
- `t`
- `r`
- `n`
- `e`
- `t`
- `t`
- `e`
- `e`
- `e`
- `u`
- `i`
- `i`
- `e`
- `f`
- `o`
- `e`
- `e`
- `o`
- `o`
- `r`
- `e`
- `n`
- `i`
- `e`
- `o`
- `e`
- `n`
